prompt: Create ADR for background job processing using scripted answers

assertions.name: adr-file-created
assertions.description: Output contains MADR frontmatter with status, date, deciders fields

assertions.name: has-two-options
assertions.description: Document contains at least 2 options sections with pros/cons

assertions.name: post-review-ran
assertions.description: review-summary.txt contains rule IDs from post-creation review

assertions.name: impact-propagation-triggered
assertions.description: review-summary reports impact propagation step ran
